meta.title: FurniCore demo activity logs and notifications
meta.prerequisite: seed-demo-users should run first so user emails resolve to real IDs. Logs whose userEmail is not found are still inserted with userId = null.
meta.idempotency: Activity logs are deleted WHERE description LIKE '[demo-seed:activity]%'. Notifications are deleted WHERE message LIKE '[demo-seed:notify]%'. Both are then re-inserted on each run.

activityLogs.description: [demo-seed:activity] Seeded 21 standard Chart of Accounts entries

notifications.title: Supplier Quote Awaiting Approval
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Hardwood Supply Co. submitted a quote for Oak Timber (200 board-ft @ $4.50). Review and approve to proceed.

notifications.title: Low Stock Alert — Oak Timber
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Oak Timber inventory has dropped to 44 board-ft, below the reorder level of 50. Consider placing a purchase order.

notifications.title: Payroll Ready for Approval
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] January 2026 payroll has been generated for 8 employees totalling $42,000 gross. Awaiting your approval.

notifications.title: New Customer Account Created
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] A new customer account was registered for alice.chen@furnicore.demo. Review the profile if needed.

notifications.title: Invoice Overdue — Emma Wilson
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Invoice INV-DEMO-2026-005 for Emma Wilson ($1,193.50) was due on 20 Mar 2026 and remains unpaid.

notifications.title: Quote Approved — FabricPlus Ltd.
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] You approved the FabricPlus Ltd. quote for Upholstery Fabric ($720.00). Proceed to payment.

notifications.title: New Supplier Quote Submitted
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] FabricPlus Ltd. submitted a new quote for Upholstery Fabric (60 m @ $12.00). Lock the price to proceed.

notifications.title: New Customer Order — David Johnson
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Order ORD-DEMO-2026-004 placed by David Johnson for a King Bedroom Set ($4,057.90). Confirm to start production.

notifications.title: Production Task Completed — Dining Table Set
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Manufacturing task for ORD-DEMO-2026-001 (Dining Table Set) passed quality check and is ready for dispatch.

notifications.title: Supplier Contact Updated — FabricPlus Ltd.
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] FabricPlus Ltd. contact details were updated. New contact: Maria Solis (+1-312-555-0199). Verify for future orders.

notifications.title: Low Stock Alert — Oak Timber
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Oak Timber is now at 44 board-ft, below the reorder level of 50. A new supplier quote has been requested.

notifications.title: Low Stock Alert — Upholstery Fabric
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Upholstery Fabric (Charcoal Grey) is at 11 meters — below the reorder level of 15. Current production orders are at risk.

notifications.title: Low Stock Alert — Pine Plank
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Pine Plank inventory dropped to 22 board-ft, below the reorder level of 30. Coordinate with procurement.

notifications.title: New Purchase Order Approved
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Quote for Upholstery Fabric from FabricPlus Ltd. was approved ($720.00). Expect restocking within 5–7 days.

notifications.title: Invoice Overdue — Emma Wilson
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Invoice INV-DEMO-2026-005 ($1,193.50) was due on 20 Mar 2026. A follow-up was sent on 25 Mar. No payment received.

notifications.title: Journal Entry Posted — Capital Contribution
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] JE-DEMO-2026-001 (Owner capital contribution $250,000) has been posted and is now reflected in the trial balance.

notifications.title: Payroll Generated — January 2026
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] January 2026 payroll for 8 employees ($42,000 gross) has been generated and submitted for approval.

notifications.title: Accrual Recognized — Installation Services
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Accrued income of $15,000 for custom installation services (Alice Chen) has been recognized and journalized.

notifications.title: Invoice Receivable — Bob Martinez
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Invoice INV-DEMO-2026-002 ($2,170.00) has been sent to Bob Martinez. Due date: 1 May 2026.

notifications.title: Payment Received — Alice Chen
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Invoice INV-DEMO-2026-001 ($4,231.50) paid in full by Alice Chen via Bank Transfer (Ref: TXN-BNK-2026-8812).

notifications.title: New Order Placed — Carol Smith
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Carol Smith placed order ORD-DEMO-2026-003 for a Custom L-Shaped Sofa ($3,472.00). Confirm and queue for production.

notifications.title: Invoice Overdue — Emma Wilson
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Deposit invoice INV-DEMO-2026-005 for Emma Wilson ($1,193.50) passed its due date on 20 Mar 2026. Action required.

notifications.title: Order Shipped — Bob Martinez
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] ORD-DEMO-2026-002 for Bob Martinez has been dispatched via FurniFreight (FF-2026-90134). ETA 20 Apr 2026.

notifications.title: Payment Received — Carol Smith
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Invoice INV-DEMO-2026-008 ($1,497.30) paid by Carol Smith via Credit Card (Ref: CC-AUTH-2026-55029) on delivery.

notifications.title: Your Order Has Been Confirmed
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Your order has been received and confirmed by our team. We will update you when production begins.

notifications.title: Production Has Started on Your Order
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Great news! Your furniture order is now in production. Estimated completion in 3–4 weeks.

notifications.title: Quality Check Passed — Your Order is Ready
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Your order passed our quality inspection and is scheduled for delivery soon. Thank you for your patience!

notifications.title: Your Order Has Been Delivered
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] ORD-DEMO-2026-001 has been delivered to your address on 12 Feb 2026. We hope you love your new dining set!

notifications.title: Invoice Ready — INV-DEMO-2026-001
notifications.message: [demo-seed:notify] Your invoice for the Luxury Dining Table Set ($4,231.50) is ready. Payment was received successfully. Thank you!
